scripts.dev: pnpm dev:infra && concurrently -k -n engine,control-plane,dashboard -c yellow,green,magenta "pnpm dev:engine" "pnpm dev:control-plane" "pnpm dev:dashboard"
scripts.dev:engine: METER_DATABASE_URL=postgres://meter:meter@127.0.0.1:5433/meter METER_CLICKHOUSE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8123 METER_CLICKHOUSE_USER=meter METER_CLICKHOUSE_PASSWORD=meter METER_CLICKHOUSE_DATABASE=meter cargo run -p meter-engine
scripts.dev:dashboard: cd apps/dashboard && METER_CONTROL_PLANE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8090 METER_ENGINE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8080 DASHBOARD_PASSWORD=meter DASHBOARD_SESSION_SECRET=local-dev-session-secret-change-me bun run dev
